title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: ST VINCENT DE PAUL ALOHA UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides limited utility payment assistance for PGE and water bills, depending on available funding. Assistance is paid to the utility company. 3145 SW 192nd Avenue Aloha, OR 97003 Eligibility: Low income households who live within the parish boundaries Hours: Last day of the month at 12:01am until capacity is reached (this can be in a few hours) (503) 649-5841 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Reception (503) 649-5841 Food Pantry INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call at the specific time to obtain an appointment; first-come, first-served. Messages left before or after service hours will not be returned. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Utility bill in the applicant's name AREA SERVED: Parts of the City of Aloha and zip codes 97003, 97005, 97006, 97007, 97008 Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - ST VINCENT DE PAUL FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST VINCENT DE PAUL ALOHA
